title: sphaeropteris auriculifera
intro: Sphaeropteris auriculifera, also known as the earlobe tree fern, is a species of plant in the family Cyathea. It is native to Australia and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant has various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating skin conditions, and is often used in herbal preparations to treat wounds and promote healing. It is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
